sourcesContent:
export const profile = {
  name: "Janani",
  title: "Mobile App Developer",
  summary:
    "I build modern mobile applications using React Native. I focus on clean UI, API integration, authentication, and smooth user experiences.",
  description:
    "I am a passionate React Native mobile app developer with nearly 10 months of hands-on experience building cross-platform apps. I specialize in clean and user-friendly interfaces, REST API integration, smooth navigation, and high-performance mobile experiences. I have worked on real-time event management and booking platforms, and I am currently pursuing my MCA while actively improving mobile applications.",
  email: "jananikumaresan2004.r@gmail.com",
  phone: "6381062446",
  resume: {
    href: "/Janani_Resume.pdf",
    fileName: "Janani_Resume.pdf",
  },
  links: [
    { label: "GitHub", href: "https://github.com/JananiKala" },
    { label: "LinkedIn", href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/jananikumaresan" },
    { label: "Portfolio", href: "https://myprotfolio-1-ao89.onrender.com" },
  ],
};

    status: "In Development",
    links: [],
  },
  {
